ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-17-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2003 Continued To Sep-29-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/29/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Patricia Van Steenberge. (212)

Minors Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR. Lavon Granger.
Appearances:
Robert Menchini, Esq. for Petitioner Thomas Menjiva, the guardian ad litem, also present for the minor, Priscilla Menjivar.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Attorney's fees: $471.00.
A net balance of $1,014.50 to be deposited into a blocked account at the Bank of America lacated at 2900 S. Elcamino, San Mateo, until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2003 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-28-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
